title: Screen share consent before browser picker
description:
Remote help screen sharing now shows our consent modal first — "Would you like to share your screen?" with Yes / No. Choosing No cancels cleanly without opening the browser picker.

On Yes, a single-step hint explains that PipeShare or PipeSync is already selected in the picker; the customer clicks Open share picker, then only needs to click Share once in Chrome/Edge (preferCurrentTab + displaySurface browser + monitorTypeSurfaces exclude). Wrong surface (whole window/screen) still shows a retry prompt instead of looping.

Also includes dbg158 fixes: single getDisplayMedia per session, screen-capture color-mix html2canvas fix, and picker-loop guards.

Who is affected: OVH PipeShare and PipeSync users on HTTPS (dbg159). HTTP still uses DOM viewport relay only. SaaS unchanged.
changeLog: Yes/No screen-share consent before browser picker; No skips getDisplayMedia.
Single-step hint: app tab pre-selected — click Share in browser.
shareAppLabel() for PipeShare vs PipeSync copy.
Fix screen-share picker loop: single getDisplayMedia per remote attach.
preferCurrentTab + browser tab constraints; reject window/monitor share.
Support chat screenshot: html2canvas strips color-mix() from theme CSS.
